docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2008 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY GOLDBERG, GARY AMERICAN AIRLINES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDBERG, GARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $188.10 FILED BY GOLDBERG, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
